query:
ALTER TABLE users 
ADD COLUMN assessor_tier ENUM('free', 'premium', 'enterprise') DEFAULT 'free',
ADD COLUMN tier_activated_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
ADD COLUMN tier_expires_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
ADD COLUMN performance_score INT DEFAULT 70,
ADD COLUMN total_assessments_completed INT DEFAULT 0,
ADD COLUMN average_variance_from_final INT NULL;
